analysis.consistency: The provided JSON structure is consistent with a standard D&D 5e spell entry. All expected fields (slug, name, level, school, ritual, casting_time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present and populated.
analysis.quality: The data quality is high. The description is detailed and clearly outlines the mechanical effects, including the saving throw, duration, area of effect, and the limitations of the deception prevention.

mechanics.name: Zone of Truth
mechanics.effect: Forces a Charisma saving throw on entry or at the start of the turn. Failed save prevents speaking deliberate lies while inside the area. Caster knows the result of the save.
mechanics.notes: The spell is clear that creatures can still be evasive without lying, and are aware of the enchantment, allowing tactical avoidance of direct questions.
